title: Council Election #2
brief: This proposal determines who will serve on the Star Atlas DAO Council for its second term (April 11, 2025 - January 11, 2026). As outlined in PIP-10, there will be only one round of voting. Seven candidates nominated themselves during the nomination period. The top five candidates, selected through ranked-choice voting using the Single Transferable Vote (STV) method, will become officially elected Star Atlas Council members on April 11th, 2025.
description:
# PIP-11 (Council Election #2)

This proposal determines who will serve on the Star Atlas DAO Council for its second term (April 11, 2025 - January 11, 2026). As outlined in [PIP-10](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/ed887a4e-344e-44d6-8a47-c815d9e8ec8e), there will be only one round of voting.

Seven candidates nominated themselves during the nomination period. The top five candidates, selected through ranked-choice voting using the **Single Transferable Vote (STV)** method, will become officially elected Star Atlas Council members on April 11th, 2025.

For more information regarding the Star Atlas Council and the election process, please review [PIP-10](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/ed887a4e-344e-44d6-8a47-c815d9e8ec8e). You can also read up on the Council and how the DAO operates on the [DAO Knowledge Base](https://star-atlas-dao.gitbook.io/knowledge-base/overview/our-structure/council).

# DAO Council Nominees

![emperoraa](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/2/Emperor.png)

## Emperor ===[] (emperoraa)

**X Profile:** N/A

I want to be a part of helping create a new type of governance structure. A DAO (Decentralized Autonomous Organization) is, in my opinion, a very elegant way to govern. I believe in personal responsibility and individual rights. I also believe in the power of the collective as well as non-compelled altruism. Empowering people but also having wise leadership. Rules but no ruler. With my decades of IRL experience in governance, entrepreneurship, mentorship, and altruism, I think I could bring valuable input to the DAO to help shape its future.

---

![drumcarl05](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/2/DRUMCARL05.JPG)

## DRUMCARL05 (drumcarl05)

**X Profile:** [@Carlito99897464](https://x.com/Carlito99897464)

**Experienced Leadership | Community Bridge | Governance Pioneer**

Active Star Atlas community member since September 2021 and founding member of the inaugural Star Atlas DAO Council. Throughout my first term, I contributed to establishing crucial governance infrastructure and standardizing PIP processes while maintaining a consistent attendance record at Council meetings.

As a prominent voice in the Hispanic community, I regularly provide updates and facilitate discussions at Spanish Atlas Brew events, ensuring inclusive governance that spans language barriers and broadens participation across our diverse ecosystem.

My commitment to transparency, consistent engagement, and cross-cultural outreach positions me to continue strengthening our DAO’s foundation while expanding its global reach in a second term.

🗳️ Vote for continued dedication and experienced leadership.

---

![marshalza](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/2/Marshal_ZA.jpeg)

## [MERC]★★★|MARSHAL|★★★[ZA] (marshalza)

**X Profile:**  N/A

Create an organized infrastructure between the indie DEVs, DAO, and the players. Where players could influence the development of the needed tools, while the indie DEVs can receive substantial financial rewards.

Make DAO work by making the interaction players more accessible and simple. From casual "I want this and this"  to a prepared assignment specification to a vote and a release of the idea.

Find new ways for players and the Star Atlas project to profit. This is the goal.

---

![lanzer](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/2/Lanzer.png)

## Lanzer (lanzer)

**X Profile:** [@mrLanzer](https://x.com/mrLanzer)

Star Atlas blends my favorite games, FreeAllegiance (Microsoft) & PlanetSide 2 (Sony), and embodies web3’s best: welcoming, scale, open development, integrated. I’m heavily invested in SA and aim to enhance the DAO by expanding its knowledge base, simplifying participation, and meeting community needs.

- Gaming Experience: Published mini-games (ranked 7th of 682), co-founded community-led tournament/broadcasting orgs (130+ volunteer staff that broke Guinness World Record), and senior leadership of 10K+ member guilds.
- Professional: 13+ years in contract/proposal work, software program management of $5B-dollar aircraft fleet, PMP cert, Six Sigma, Masters degree in Acquisitions, DAO Certified by Blockchain Council.
- Web3/DAO: 10+ years in web3, active in 8 DAOs, authored 9 proposals, passionate about DAOs as a fusion of business, leadership, community, and gaming.

As a CLUB, BULK, and SuperPhoenix DAO member with 5M PVP, I’m dedicated to Star Atlas’s success. I offer proven leadership, web3 expertise, game experience, and contract/proposal skill. I ask for your vote on the Star Atlas Council.

---

![jithblade](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/2/Jith_Blade.gif)

## [EMP] jith blade (jithblade)

**X Profile:** [@jithblade](https://x.com/jithblade)

I am looking forward to continuing to work with the community in creating a robust governance platform and helping to make Star Atlas successful regardless of the outcome of this election.

---

![signals_alt](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/2/Signal.jpeg)

## ROME | Signal (signals_alt)

**X Profile:** [@the_only_signal](https://x.com/the_only_signal)

The Star Atlas DAO needs passion, fire, and engagement now more than ever.  The industry needs this now more than ever.  If we don’t fight right now today to create value for POLIS, the DAO, and the broader Star Atlas ecosystem, there may be nothing to fight for later.  Energy, passion, innovation, and deep experience with Star Atlas is what I bring to the table.  With the right partners, that could be enough to change history and do something really incredible here.  LFG.

---

![bodhitree_](https://cdn.staratlas.com/dao/council-election/2/Bodhi_TREE.png)

## bodhitree_ (bodhitree_)

**X Profile:** N/A

My name is Bodhi,\
I am a long time supporter of SA, I’ve have been active in game and within the community for over three years. As a current council member, I’ll be able to facilitate the transition to the new term. I believe in a conservative approach when it comes to DAO spending, and would like to see quality over quantity in pips. That said, I am unbiased when facilitating authors through the pip process. As a second term council member, my focus will be on Three main aspects:

1. Marketing the DAO through social media.
2. Fostering community engagement by contributing to an encouraging, and interactive environment.
3. facilitating the transition to the second council term.

I enjoy working with community authors to improve their pips. I’m able to foster friendships, while helping them optimize their proposal, and add value to the project. It’s the best part of the job, and I hope to continue doing it. I put my trust in Star Atlas, and appreciate your trust in me to serve on council.
